instruction: The maximum function should return the LARGER of a and b, but it returns the smaller one. Fix the comparison so maximum(3, 7) == 7 and maximum(9, 2) == 9.

files.mymax.py:
def maximum(a, b):
    return a if a < b else b
files.test_mymax.py:
from mymax import maximum


def test_max():
    assert maximum(3, 7) == 7
    assert maximum(9, 2) == 9
